data.title: Spectrum Analyzer Market expected to reach $2.28 billion by 2033 with CAGR of 5.98% from 2025-2033, as per ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on the Spectrum Analyzer Market forecasts significant growth and trends from 2025 to 2033. The market size is expected to increase from US$1.35 billion in 2024 to US$2.28 billion by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.98% during the forecast period. Factors driving this growth include a heightened focus on strengthening the military and defense industries, the expanding telecommunications sector with the rise of 5G connections, and an increasing demand for such technologies.

data.title: Bragg Gaming Group gets $6.0M debt facilities from BMO, provides cyber breach update.
data.description: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG), a prominent global provider of B2B iGaming content and technology, revealed a fresh financing arrangement with the Bank of Montreal (BMO). Under this deal, BMO has granted the Company access to credit facilities totaling up to US$6.0 million. This funding is aimed at bolstering Bragg’s day-to-day operational needs and general corporate purposes.

data.title: David Ellison's significant spending at Paramount is reshaping Hollywood's atmosphere, making a mark with his quick acquisitions.
data.description: David Ellison has quickly made his mark as the owner of Paramount, particularly in the realm of acquisitions.

data.title: Tether launching USAT stablecoin, regulated under GENIUS Act. Bo Hines appointed CEO. USDT has $169B market cap.
data.description: Tether, the leading stablecoin issuer, has introduced a new U.S.-regulated stablecoin called USA₮. This stablecoin is compliant with the GENIUS Act and aims to adhere to U.S. regulations. The announcement was made in a recent press release. Additionally, Tether appointed Bo Hines, the former executive director of the White House Crypto Council, as the CEO of the new U.S. entity. USA₮ will utilize Hadron by Tether technology and will have Anchorage Digital as the issuer compliant with the GENIUS Act, while Cantor Fitzgerald will act as the reserve custodian. Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, highlighted the company's long-standing presence in the stablecoin industry with its flagship USDT token, which currently holds a market capitalization of $169 billion and is utilized by nearly 500 million users worldwide, particularly catering to the underbanked and unbanked populations. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coinbase's legal motion filed over Gensler, SEC's missing texts amid FOIA non-compliance, seeking hearing and remedies.
data.description: Attorneys representing Coinbase have submitted a request for a legal hearing and potential actions as the SEC did not fulfill Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests. Coinbase's legal team seeks remedies following the SEC's non-compliance with the FOIA requests.

data.title: Adobe exceeds expectations with strong AI growth, reporting $6.0 billion in total revenues, $88 million above estimates.
data.description: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE) announced positive fiscal third-quarter results leading to a surge in their stock prices. Analysts shared their insights on the financial performance with Piper Sandler, RBC Capital Markets, Stifel, DA Davidson, and Citizens JMP Securities. Piper Sandler's Brent Bracelin reiterated an Overweight rating with a reduced price target of $470, while RBC's Matthew Swanson maintained an Outperform rating with a price target of $430. Stifel's Parker Lane reaffirmed a Buy rating and $480 price target and DA Davidson's Gil Luria reiterated a Buy rating with a $500 price target. Citizens JMP Securities' Patrick Walravens held a Market Outperform rating. Adobe reported total revenues of $6.0 billion, surpassing estimates with a $88 million beat. Subscription growth also rose to 12% year-on-year. These results indicate Adobe's positive performance amidst increasing competition and technological advancements in the artificial intelligence sector.

data.title: Bitcoin price touched $116,000, near parabolic rally. Analyst mentions 2 key indicators to watch in next 3 days.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin (BTC) spiked to $116,000 on Friday morning, sparking discussions among traders about a potential parabolic rally. Analyst Kevin pointed out two key cycle indicators to monitor: Short-Term Bubble Risk, which gauges Bitcoin's distance from its bull market support band on the weekly chart, indicating BTC has not entered the red "bubble risk" zone typical of cycle peaks; and the 200-Week SMA. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Solana hits $16.6B open interest with traders eyeing $250+ target, futures incl. Galaxy and Forward Industries. Is $300 next for SOL?
data.description: The open interest for Solana futures has surged to $16.6 billion, with the participation of Galaxy and Forward Industries in the adoption of the cryptocurrency. This increase has sparked speculation about the potential for Solana's native token, SOL, to reach $300 in the near future.

data.title: Global Subscription Box Market expected to reach $113.57 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 14.18% from 2025-2033. Fuelled by consumer interest in personalized products and convenience.
data.description: A report titled "Subscription Box Market - Consumer Trends & Forecast 2025-2033" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global Subscription Box Market's value was recorded at US$30.16 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach US$113.57 billion by 2033, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.18% during the forecast period of 2025-2033. This growth can be attributed to increasing consumer demand for personalized products, convenience, and the expansion of e-commerce. The market covers various categories including beauty, food, fitness, and lifestyle.

data.title: Europe plans to mine moon for lithium due to demand surge; EU aims to domestically source 10% of demand by 2030, with demand expected to surge twelvefold by 2030 and twenty-one times by 2050. Supply currently relies heavily on imports from China, Chile and Australia. Vulcan Energy has received permit to build lithium plant in Germany. US also working to reduce dependency on China for critical materials. Portugal holds largest known reserves in Europe with Savannah Resources advancing plans for first major European lithium mine. (Words: 97)
data.description: Europe heavily relies on lithium imports from countries like China, Chile, and Australia for its electric vehicle industry. The European Commission estimates demand for lithium will increase twelvefold by 2030 and twenty-one times by 2050. To reduce dependency and vulnerability to supply shocks, the Critical Raw Materials Act requires 10% of Europe's lithium demand to be sourced domestically by 2030. Despite reserves in countries like Portugal, Spain, Serbia, and the Czech Republic, production has been challenging. Vulcan Energy, an Australian-German venture, received a permit to build a lithium hydroxide plant in Germany to address this issue. The US, under Trump, aims to reduce reliance on China for critical materials. Portugal holds the largest known lithium reserves in Europe, with Savannah Resources working on the Mina do Barroso mine. The article emphasizes the challenges and potential solutions for Europe's lithium supply.

JPMORGAN: FED TO CUT 25BPS NEXT WEEK JPMorgan’s Michael Feroli expects the Fed to lower rates by 25bps next week to 4.0–4.25%. He sees two or three dissents favoring a bigger cut, but none for holding steady. The dot plot should still show one more cut beyond 2025.
